hace04a87g23edg414ega40dg0e56495be15e: It is time to continue the hunt, True Soul. I hunger for battle.
hdd1e441ag67fbg4abcgb671gefef2fec0279: You might stay hungry. I already dealt with some of the grove's inhabitants.
ha8e1ac9fg0709g436dg8cedge9609e92dce1: You started the slaughter without me? How selfish.
h517a9555gaec5g4041g86cdg8cd20370acf7: But we can still fight side by side. Together, we will destroy any who have not died or fled.
h55528ba5g18cbg4412g900dg28249f6d36f6: There's a problem - the druids have performed a ritual to seal the grove.
hbb37c90fg255bg4234gb827g586ae28f016e: And you allowed them to do this? You were ordered to expose them.
h8e4e037bge187g4792ga60bga88aff5a4dca: Join me and my warband at the entrance to the grove. Either it falls, or you do.
h765b7b2bge11cg4f32g950fgd4b94d706369: I'm ready. The grove will fall.
hdab22e38g773fg4586g8ed9ga483629a8c08: I'm told that drow have escorted a prisoner from this camp. Where did they take her?
h1a9a5c88g53a6g44b8ga24egf14f93fa1d3e: The human woman? I cannot say. But if she was taken, the Absolute must have need of her.
h623fa493g9df8g47d9gb5adgd93824dca4bf: So do I. I'm here to kill you.
h2ff1a9d4gad56g4493g8ef0gce0c94473ef2: The goblins tell me that you extracted a confession from our prisoner, True Soul.
h954054f3gb657g4659ga708gb119b5b2698d: Without your help, they would have extracted nothing but screams and blood.
h9912fc96g0a14g4c5bga63bg18a1051f1c12: *Her thoughts mingle with yours; a cold hand caressing your brain.*
h06d842beg131fg48a2g9440g397ea79bc873: You are a True Soul, jaluk? Perhaps you are worthy to assist me.
hbbd2c127gdb55g4c7egb8a7gc890165532d9: It is time for the raid to begin. The grove, and those who are hiding there, will fall.
h362a6905ge0a9g4741gb002g92c406f9f71b: There is a weapon the Absolute seeks - I'm sure those wretches have it hidden away there. We will find it, amongst the dead and the ashes.
h4d0e8a12g021fg4a15g8c96gb5cec8461f32: *Her excitement is palatable. She lingers on thoughts of victory, of unbelievers' blood spilled...
h77b888abg9bf7g465bgae78g27be0c69aa0f: *... and of the weapon. She will seize it, in the Absolute's name.*
h46fc408dg0dbag4852g9f21g262541a94b99: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon the Absolute seeks - it's the artefact that she carries. The same one that protected you as you entered the goblin camp.*
ha66033fagda50g4ea9gaeb7gec8854d3b9cd: *Her mind focuses - the cultists cannot discover that the weapon they seek is within their grasp.*
h988db53ag53f4g4377g8c66gd9c0a290cbf5: *You realise that the weapon the drow's mind dwells upon is the gith artefact you carry. You cannot let her discover it - not matter what.*
h6880c06ag7f3ag4dd0ga2edgff8da17c819a: *You suddenly feel a strange anxiety take hold - not your own, but that of the gith artefact you carry. Somehow, it's afraid...*
hd11080ceg9790g4ad5g9694g167a490d0d1a: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not want to part from you. It does not want to fall into the Absolute's clutches.*
h3fa1237agbc6eg4b57g9ec1gf2e67cc65971: You are a True Soul, sister? It is good to have your assistance.
he4793050g9075g4499gb6f0g313affee357c: A True Soul in such a grotesque form? The Absolute has a place in Her heart even for darthiir.
ha46f9c74g1b00g4606g9b01g82cfc4fdf669: You are a True Soul? Little wonder that you serve me so well.
h69047d65gda38g4051gb62fg999f6ae2b895: I have been expecting you. The goblins tell me that you forced a confession from our prisoner.
ha01f4060g872bg4f4cga49fged0e678253b4: I trust you have found the sanctuary? I hunger for battle.
hf91d7aaeg0cb9g46ebgb42dg2bbc3f5bc1e5: I visited the grove you are looking for. Many of its inhabitants are already dead.
hd7d080abgaae4g46a5gb2f0g36764960ad13: I visited the grove - the druids have performed a ritual to seal it from intruders.
hfb505f52g1bc5g4675ga135g19d0dcb386a0: The prisoner gave up his secrets.
h0de38bb6g88ecg4185g83c2gb674359821c1: These creatures have failed me again? I will deal with those responsible later.
h9574e74cg3a83g4938gb7e7g44be0d9d53c3: Did he tell you where his friends are hiding before he fled?
h3b2d6363g4a2dg4b8cg8f51g0ab687eda454: No, but I've seen the place myself.
h141cb02ag6775g4254g8de8g022a5793c4f5: I'm sorry. I didn't get anything out of him.
h6abadddbg4c56g4576g8cdfg7b9a758f05e2: Perhaps... but your thoughts are troubled. Show me everything you have seen.
he916ab4cga30dg4eb4gad1ag66550831b99f: *Her mind enters yours, a splinter of ice piercing your memories.*
hbf48a9e5gf0eag4aceg99b0g591b67f18a51: Let me see your map. I'll show you where the grove is.
h8879beb3gcd01g4e7eg914ag983635718f6a: How did a drow come to be commanding a tribe of goblins?
h230ee2c2g9f9eg4686gab5bga03e653bf4f8: They are flocking to the Absolute. In sufficient numbers, they are an effective force. Expendable and willing.
h20cf4b42g0d6bg4db9g8d5bga7a5153ca937: I'm told that drow have escorted a prisoner from this camp. Where did they take her?
hf9c313c1gdebbg4f59g88dfga2822c3602a2: Then do as you were ordered.
h40f8e7aagbc48g4609gac07g48761206a330: How can you allow spiders to be used for bloodsport? It's heresy.
h415c1257ge60cg4736ga300gcbf41b57b1a1: I thought spiders were sacred to your kind, yet you use them for bloodsport?
h19479f74ga5a4g4b54g89bfg41931433f461: They are vermin - sacred only to the false goddess Lolth. She has no power here, among the Absolute's chosen.
h8b4b344fg9e19g46aagaca7ge86e335219e9: You denounce Lolth? Heretic - I'll kill you!
hc1456e2ag237ag44f8ga9dag57ea6ab1c324: Report. And make it quick - organising these creatures tests my patience.
h216f0f42gd5aag4177g9229g37f33dbaad53: I trust you have cleared your mind? I hunger for battle. We must find the sanctuary.
h9f246878g8126g4585g90d0g2e120ba9f6ff: I do not have time for interruptions from underlings.
h619bd73dg0838g467dgb352g1d539dec5fdb: *As she turns to you, her thoughts mingle with yours; a cold hand caressing your brain.*
h23f7bdeagcb3dg4037gb411g536e89c68b52: *The chamber melts away to reveal a dark, endless nowhere. In it, you see a vision - the drow listens as a pale-eyed young woman whispers in her ear.*
h8d00127dg71f1g4eb9ga460g27562849f9d2: *One of those the voice spoke of. One of the Chosen. The vision fades away...*
head78912gfa72g440ag856ag568116e950f1: A half-drow, but a True Soul? The Absolute's blessings may atone for the impurities of your blood.
h492d7d16g12edg4f9agb2fag809020416fe5: Now, you must hunt with me. In Her name.
h71266e4dg7b97g4888gb108g04c6f93c0972: A True Soul? Praise be, sister. Are you here to join my hunt?
h068fa55bg6698g42e4ga189g51a24419e9a4: A True Soul? Do not think that means we are equals, jaluk. Are you here to join my hunt?
h3c85fa63g915fg4529gb738ga590ff369104: A True Soul in such a grotesque form? The Absolute has a place in Her heart even for darthiir.
h1c5e13e3gb7d2g430fga17ege4322859b384: Her heart is more generous than mine. Join my hunt, faerie. And obey me.
h9c5306eeg4f33g4adfgaa8egfa05db7bbc87: I'm on a hunt of my own. I'm looking for a druid named Halsin.
hc7a736f7ge581g48c5g9ca6g9785fc1ace77: Interesting. What do you know of this druid?
h4378b0bdga631g4bf6g8d09g3f1a1c1f7d5a: I visited his grove. Many of the inhabitants are already dead.
h9b1162e2g0c5eg4291g9072g2e158b2e68e5: I visited his grove - but the druids there have cast a protective spell over the place.
h80fb1c1dg9ef0g4a0aga1acgcf3eaa3f6202: Perfect. This grove is the place I am seeking. Show me where it is, and we will destroy it together.
h644472aeg030ag41aag8411gd1b6fb9c9ea7: Don't you dare lead them to the grove. End her - now.
hc7bcf5bbg3184g486fg9eeagb291d74f5416: Sooner than later, if I've got a say in it.
h65dffed2gd549g4d0ag8e80g0be69dcf7d6b: Show me the grove. Be my eyes.
h7299585eg82fcg432agb6d7ga23bd69388b1: Quiet. I have everything under control.
h1032303ag53cfg4659g80e1gd4d53bf4d8b8: Send her to the grove. Better to face them on familiar ground.
hd1119950ge77fg4509ga75aga46ca6826648: You'll think of no better, I assure you.
hcadf3ff1g0620g47a7g8183g3fe81802d260: And endanger the entire grove? It's too risky.
hacdb447bgb100g4907gb908g73703d40bcd8: Even a kith'rak might struggle to slay them here. At the grove, we have an advantage.
hc24cfda7g5ee9g46e2gb72eg6bc3c32f8250: Quiet. We'll handle this my way.
h814c72c4g9e3fg4a24g9e91g766ff780b5e2: Precisely the way I meant to avoid.
hae725ddeg7a9bg49e2g933bg020f8f667a78: *You can already feel her minding closing around yours, her bloodlust like needles in your skull.*
hd5799b12ga173g4ce7g9b09g2bc86a5738be: The tieflings should be warned. Together, you can outnumber her warband.
he37ae2e3g2c53g4287g93b2g37c5ee977f71: My patience wears thin, True Soul. The hunt must begin.
h5d4ba56dg86afg4fffgbfadga48f75a48188: Perhaps you can misdirect her... or kill her.
h491e4804gb05cg4dadgac81ge35bf126abcf: Leading her to the tieflings might doom them... but it would earn her trust.
h4fb936b2gcbfcg4e09gbe9cg25899c0b2c22: The grove's inhabitants are weak - it's ready to fall.
h3a16919dg4a13g491cgb8e6g32d4de3d16e7: Even with the grove's numbers depeleted, dealing with her there may be safer than fighting here.
h3bad5e34g1e67g41a2ga74ag1c4016a2858c: The druids' magic protects the grove, but she may be able to break through.
h79994151gc39cg44f9g8bb8g7fac94a1011e: I've heard rumours that he's a very powerful healer.
h23b4c94fgc6b8g4c7eg8c24ga98872b6c0be: There is no power except for the Absolute. If you are sick, speak to the goblin's priestess - she too is a True Soul.
hc5e6eff1gcaddg49dfgaf81gdd6a57453754: I have not seen this druid, but he harbours worshippers of a false god in a hidden grove nearby.
hcb96a996g26d7g42c0gbacdga16a8d93c540: I intend to find it, and destroy it.
h9d8be34egb367g48a2gb957g2c3fa365c39f: We can't let them find the grove. End her - now.
hae4392b4gd8c2g4d99gbfc7g08cdb630e4c7: Make peace with your Absolute - the Blade comes for your head!
h81c1a07bgecb5g4372g95a0g3dcc4141dc47: Enough. Speak only to me, True Soul. The hunt must begin.
h282d39f1gd83dg44a6g9d2agb4a8700f6e31: Nothing makes the blood hotter. Let's hunt.
h5f9dfd17g2a93g4f72ga75agc514da8a359b: I would expect nothing less, jaluk. Perhaps even you are more capable than these goblins.
h4f5d7c52gc1bag45bdga452gf68705852e53: And when we destroy the trappings of this false god, the Absolute will reward us with such power.
h77661c74gb6f3g4586ga70cg46583ab94a9a: Why not send a goblin scouting party?
h8127b32dg46a5g498cgb4adga69fec8c483e: The last I sent did not return. Dead at the hands of those they seek, no doubt.
hbdf4bd7dg28a7g43afg81e4gadffa11c271b: I would take greater pleasure in killing them myself than in sending them to die in the woods.
hbffa87fbg8916g4157gadcagb6a57150aa1e: And the occasional mass execution does wonders for discipline.
h33b68c4dg6020g45cfgbb96g7db073098ba2: One. We captured a human who knows exactly where it is.
h3c3f9db5gd62eg4d2fgbc19g0123036ae46c: He's been resilient but he'll talk...
h42b96910gedaag4c0dg8376g8efa9fd84baf: Enough. Speak only to me while you are in my presence. The hunt must begin soon.
h18befb6cg4d7cg4fc6gbe7dgdc4e423a5c94: The place you seek is a grove - many of the inhabitants are already dead.
h7fd2a4f2g733cg48c9g9cdfg63b30977fa41: If you played a part in thinning their numbers, I commend your efforts.
hda2ed7d0ga5d9g40e5ga546g6f30a928f74f: Together, we will slaughter any who remain.
h704ab866g0858g414cg9445g7e38e6231fec: Join me and my warband at the grove. It will fall.
h30c9d797g367fg409eg8064g706ad393af12: The place you seek is a grove - the druids there have performed a ritual to protect it.
h93b9a741g3037g4eb1gb460gbdb3f3d62cff: And you believe their god's roots and branches can stand against the Absolute's fury?
h17229d52g0923g41bagbf14g081e59c2800f: If the prisoner is as cowardly as most humans, I just need to pay him a visit.
hdd6264b6g7f32g42feg907egae721e814d90: I can be very persuasive - I'll visit the prisoner.
h11d884d8gb35bg4a92gb01fg790af567d686: Excellent - be sure not to kill him before he talks.
hf3215acegd741g4eccgbecdg13441513ecb8: I spoke to the prisoner. He told me everything.
h25e2836cg7ab1g4ae8g97e2g5908988508e0: Tell me what you know. The Absolute will reward us with such power if we find this place.
h0fdcbc62g9fdfg4758g9f2fgcd13e17390a9: Point to the location of the grove on her map.
h575b4702g24b3g4effga1c7g434b90214d86: So close! Their fate is sealed - and you will be instrumental in the slaughter.
h2dc3617bgffcfg4297g9133g67348cefbdd5: Place your finger on a patch of forest, far from the grove.
hc620a520g8013g416agb1bdg16afad3d130a: Fool. You have fallen for his lies. We know that area well - there is nothing hidden there.
hee1b16b4g4a98g4bd0g9cb9g584b2885d8b7: We will have to do this the hard way. Scour the area, and hunt them down, then report back to me.
h84062db3gea0cg4392g9be6g3b98f03a495a: You are a poor liar. I do not know why you are protecting them, and I do not care.
he86910dbge22dg4af4ga5b0g9ef600281b55: We don't need the prisoner. I already know the place you're looking for.
h8f7a8d57ge9e1g4df2ga005g3856375f3b8b: You are sure? And how did you find it?
h3482ae02g7a13g443agb25dg106db72cf5fa: Excellent. Now show it to me! Be my eyes...
hb818e39eg9f97g4e44gbf1fg6b743ed3cffa: *Her mind enters yours, a splinter of ice piercing your memories.*
hf5d9229eg89f8g471bgb244g5cec57bfa93b: *Tiefling faces flicker into view as she attempts to learn the grove's location.*
h452abe9cgf4feg49e1g9797g2ce545ca49fe: Destroying this place is the Absolute's will. Would you defy Her?
h77bbec8cgfa9cg4335g8fbcgdd3af2470da1: You'll have to go through me to get to the grove.
hb610f816ga400g43d2g9e09gbf21f706cf3e: Do not question me. I am the Absolute's chosen.
h95973a16g0964g433cg86cag8ae871dcb7ac: Your connection to the Absolute is strong... but do not think it will protect you if you cross me.
h5e70b930ge7e6g4cc4gb5ddg18be8182c9e7: Go. Serve our god as you must. But when your work is done, I will be waiting. Together, we will burn that place.
h2b465d8bg4a68g4a11ga92dg8f3725e44e21: If that is true, killing you will prove my superiority.
ha11f8380g6592g42deg97f4g165f3069a358: We're both drow. The Absolute shouldn't come between us.
h8e30614cg33e6g4852g836dgdefc68efb7a6: I would sacrifice a thousand drow if the Absolute commanded it! You will be the first!
he45d9604g37b8g47bcg8a57gb52ed5b4bbb7: I refuse to betray my own kind.
hc7c25529g73f3g46ecg890dg1612b77f0a4f: Faith is stronger than blood, traitor!
h04ff98c8g30d9g4554g8987g0ea7640e989a: *She sees the entrance to the grove, as the adventurers retreat inside, joining the tieflings...*
he46960a3ge4d8g4773g9d0fge0a41dbc6d39: *... and then sees vines covering the entrance, sealing the grove from the inside.*
h3674874dgc398g4f1bga4ffg1e22d455ef3a: The druids have called on their god to protect the place. No matter.
h0df09dc1gc59bg4c3dg935cge218df7f6089: *... and then sees the corpses of those who have already died.*
he66d94d3g9f53g4c4egbd92g1b30b2e601bc: I see the slaughter has already begun. We will eliminate those who remain together, True Soul.
he07d4ff1gc18cg42b5gaa54gfaab8a38e547: *... and then smiles serenely as blood and shadow spread like stains across your memory, erasing all that live there.*
h76cbafccg8ee4g412fga171g19b5b0bfb757: The cowards found refuge among the desperate. Perfect.
hb8993001ge1edg4866gb5d0g4cc0ed0e4747: If the inhabitants do not realise you are the knife at their throats. We can use that against them.
hb3542a55g6e0dg4a0dg8cdag9a6dd1ac5629: Go to their refuge, and make your way inside. As a friend.
h5ea32ab8gc0b4g4ec7g8d83g18686afcc3bc: That won't be necessary. Many of the inhabitants are already dead.
h86e0f109g5568g4152g9987g3bc6d728a3f3: There's no way inside - the druids have performed a ritual to seal the place.
h7795e137gbd1dg4206ga14eg97137330b8c2: Battle must be conducted with honour. How can you prefer deception?
h60ecbaf1g3197g4bc5ga2bag3c2f786f0bce: I prefer to face my enemies rather than stabbing them in the back.
h5543d010g38a2g4484gb14dgfe626a46c062: I will gather a raiding party and move into position.
hb095825bg4a86g4a7ag9807gdefbac63cbab: You will open the gates from the inside when the time is right to strike.
h2b9673e9g704cg4178gb751gd5093d92f970: We will cleanse the place of infidels, and burn it to the ground in the Absolute's name.
h191b26abg85b2g4a8ag9d48g9f3b9755f8a4: And then we will be first among Her favourites.
hb357cca2g9c54g45ecg8160g5cd76a114848: I've done enough. The battle is yours to fight.
h37cf1907ge9beg493ag9a3cg4b435b87da0d: I do not intend to lead a suicidal charge. The goblins are expendable; I am not.
h3a621617gbcd5g485eg983aga25dcb977c16: The Absolute brought you here for a reason - to throw open those gates so we can crush our enemies.
h2bbc627agfd45g4691g8945gb835e7100acc: You're right. I'll see you at the grove.
he7df0c3ag79c4g48ddga95bga021b554fcf0: Excellent. Open the gate on my signal, and we will break them.
h90755a5cgf526g434fg9ca2g108f3bf8c98a: And when they are dead, the Absolute will reward your faith. As will I.
hdfc8f390g7312g4082g8707ge5ca077a54d4: I have other business to attend to.
ha06308bbgb970g4abbgad53gf8b7e64dc31a: Take care of it quickly. You are needed here, and my patience wears thin.
h98d2bee4g4b79g4d01gb610gd849a5b70532: If I do this, I expect to be rewarded.
h6809e883gf382g4ba4gb984gb4eddb0cf6bd: You are honoured to serve a cause - a god. You will earn Her love, and the power that flows from that love.
h6dddb133g9c50g430aga982g215f7c8a47d8: What greater reward could there be?
h7f8068a3gd960g4809g92bfge066192aff26: We are servants of the one true god, not mercenaries.
h0d4b9bc2gf9d4g4abeg8e4cg3a137751e65b: You're right. The Absolute's love is enough.
h7dc447d7g8586g4e44g8b5bg5f8cffe67b03: I will see you at the grove; open the gate on my signal, and we will break them.
h180d9109g8ed1g423fgb3a3g2c4d38d7dcb7: Gods damn it all. You're turning on your own people!
h5c3f522fg31f9g442fgba05gbdc77e09e508: Gods damn it all. What were you thinking?
ha2e8b79bg9115g4b23ga0f3ga408290d5fe8: Calm yourself. We'll set a trap in the grove, then lure them in.
hdf56f415g7c12g4bf1gb1d6ga8fd1a3eccce: We should hurry, then. Innocent lives rest in our hands.
h075654a7g2bc3g4670g8a94g9abbdc296773: This may have been a mistake. I acted rashly.
h1691c881g717ag477dgb7abg694a3e3b279b: We can still make it right. Let's head to the grove - innocent lives are at stake.
haf10297ag0e96g4658g8707g3320e06477f8: Doesn't matter - but we can still make things right.
hee86afd7g7f00g4deeg909fgcccc77941506: Let's hurry to the grove. Innocent lives rest in our hands.
hd8d1f61egf517g43f7gbd93g30d7e6501aae: I was thinking how much fun this will be.
h81fc7a3fg12eag4b91gae11g73f7545f29e7: Baldur's bollocks - I didn't think you so far gone.
h271e45f0g74f2g4d30ga5f4g40e64a1cb6c8: I need to hurry. Any blood spilled will be on your hands.
h34f43ec4gdee3g447cg9729g1a8fbbdf2d3c: Without gold I can't serve the Absolute efficiently.
headfdebeg41eeg46f7ga34bgf5e67e327168: Fine. I will share what I have. But keep it to yourself; the goblins would squander it.
he0b8f41fga2feg44c7gaf6eg57b688c875da: Kill the tieflings and take what you need.
h5bac4142gd7fdg415fga71ag749d54989f8a: The drow removed a prisoner from this camp. Where was she taken?
h3d0c75ecg5b1cg4191ga367g80ed4842939f: No. This ends now, and so do you.
hf54ea134g6c82g4936g86ccg243e231d48e5: I don't have the most trustworthy face.
hc1083f6bg0aa5g4e4agaa72g3054ba852c97: They're half-devil refugees... nobody wants them.
hb5c9ea9dg99b0g4eecgb3ffg15671c2739dd: A drowning creature will cling to a blade if nothing else is offered. Be that blade.
h6aa81100g23f1g47e5gbb55g467cfe278717: They'll die thinking I'm their hero.
hbfd05529g03adg4b14gb718g6b029a7ab357: Exquisite. The Absolute chose well when She chose you.
h49b731f1g6f26g41c8ga197g195d0d262d69: Obscure memories of the grove with images of half-remembered places.
hffff2ea7gd614g4d49g8357g85911d0c6643: I see only fragments. Your mind is confused - do what you must to clear it.
h2e313db6g7843g4ddfga5b6gbc65e87b1368: Your thoughts are... veiled? Why do you protect these devilkin?
ha077de5agfb2dg4873ga156gb20902dc7264: Your thoughts are veiled. Are you protecting these creatures because they share your blood?
hc625aa78g6812g4bccgbc20g4225232130fa: They're innocent, and no danger to you.
h212479afg7947g409agaf8bg72a56be71a88: You defy me... you defy the Absolute! Traitor!
h6fceac42gfae4g460dgb989g1b63948e0efc: Protect them? Never. My memories are yours.
hff9ccddbg6429g4748g8a17gbf7733d886a4: That is hard to believe - your mind is a maze of misdirection.
he30c1f90g72f6g43e1g9f78g370ba917bd3f: I'm sorry... I stopped by the party. The drink's clouding my mind.
h056a9593gc6c8g475dg81eag60cc355df8ff: Pathetic. You are polluting the power the Absolute has granted you.
h5f5e32ccg3bb8g40ddg8b53g1d2b72446f25: Purge yourself of these intoxicants, and come back to me when you are capable of serving as you should.
hef7d5878ge6f5g4c34gb3d5g74f41b165dbd: No. There is intent behind this deception - and you will pay for it with your life.
hf47cd658g6921g405agbed9g4a10cb3b2505: Untangle them, or you are worthless to me. My patience wears thin.
h0eb07d35g4626g4c7agaea4g382775661ca1: Assist the goblins with their interrogation - the prisoner can tell us what you cannot.
h648ad001g3352g448ag9097g4f8eb3d57fae: You're allegiance should be to me, and the Absolute. While you hold onto your past, you are worthless.
hef162fcbgb398g4e2ega0feg590dc2e4ed5a: Relent, and open your mind to her.
h9a86d205ge7cfg46fdgb9ebgdbd9a60785af: Praise be. And now, through Her will, you can be my eyes.
h8722a480g1477g4742g8becg252330e2c147: We don't need the prisoner. I already know the place you're looking for.
h0296fc95g8f1fg41f8g9fc5g412fc5767cdc: My hunt ends here - you're my prey.
he3802fb3gd783g4c45ga22cg160abd7447e5: Quiet. I have everything under control.
he6edecd3g8af5g442bg8cd9g3a9d5ec0afc2: And endanger the entire grove? It's too risky.
hf6fae9a4gbb05g4811gb836g40cec99053f0: Quiet. We'll handle this my way.
h44045e24g07d9g4601g87aeg8eadf1f1e76e: *She is seeking the grove you visited. Already, you feel her mind closing around yours.*
h519ece22g7acbg4a04g8c2fga7be24241039: The tieflings should be warned. Together, you can outnumber her warband.
h586aea46g4585g4ca3ga57ag31959ca26a9b: Speak, True Soul. The hunt must begin soon.
h2efd0b7bga2a5g4ce4gb22cgff900ea1e5c0: Leading her to the tieflings might doom them... but it would earn you her trust.
he74351d1ga8d9g4a2bgb4efgf46ab7881777: Perhaps you can misdirect her... or kill her.
h9a3f9babg2795g4672g97a9gc681ea102a35: The grove's inhabitants are weak - it's ready to fall.
h470a52cag9ee5g4acega102gcf7bff028257: Even with the grove's numbers depeleted, dealing with her there may be safer than fighting here.
hce88ee57gb8b1g44d7ga385g26ee9cf59c11: The druids' magic protects the grove, but she may be able to break through.
h153a8a83gd040g43e2gaaa4gc7afb19992c0: I've already found the place - it's a druid's grove, not far from here.
h69a5530bg9e27g4e89g89c9g90f859492298: I know the place - it's east of here. A grove of some kind.
hc46f75b9g8b5bg4ebdgb14dg4976277dedf9: You are sure? Show it to me. Be my eyes.
h0e71bbc0g718cg4834gbe14g859d1d1921c3: *Images of the battle at the gate shimmer into view, along with the adventurers pleading to be let inside.*
hfd44a672g4823g4f48g9b2cg88ee332817e9: The prisoner talked, with a little encouragement. I know where the others are hiding.
hecd0f0a5ga5fcg4795g8c8fg919817f6cf82: Yes, sister. Together, we shall burn it to the ground.
h307166b6g7a7bg4020g8403g44241c415e4f: I would expect nothing less. Together, we shall burn it to the ground.
h38370f08ge485g4543ga50dg6a701e22a254: What's so important about this sanctuary?
h78c6dab6g8522g45cag9c7cg30d0de0a23fc: Destroying it will demonstrate our power. Soon, all false gods will cower before the Absolute.
hb391020bg090ag4b60g86f9g0221a74b6960: Drow have taken a prisoner from this place. Where was she delivered?
h9958c840gf573g441eg992eg4c3946f7fb3f: I know the place you're looking for - it's a druid's grove.
h979adc1cge74dg4feega722gf1dd81a17134: This ends now - so does your life.
h055dfd47g4ce6g4c84gbcb6gee785f03ad5f: Quiet. I have everything under control.
h0d3fb4adg7a79g4252g9f36g4531a4828fbd: And endanger the entire grove? It's too risky.
h8887a360g8d5bg4082g9168g9cafe3bea999: Quiet. We'll handle this my way.
h2722628bg8500g4c8cg9c64g4d09f723fb98: Luring her to the grove might expose her, provided you forewarn the tieflings.
h1491980ag4ecag4db4ga893gf5e687e4cb5f: If she finds the grove, everyone there will die. You need to throw her off the trail.
h70a3f89ega0a4g40e9g8dbeg8d4975a7f5bc: Revealing its location might doom the tieflings - but it'd earn you her trust.
hbe100d26g88ceg4ae1gb5f3gd9b7c1b24810: The grove's inhabitants are weak - it's ready to fall.
hb3119939g4707g40c8gb41egae85e991b568: Even with the grove's numbers depeleted, dealing with her there may be safer than fighting here.
h2fc67969ga99ag41dcg9425g224f03dc7cbf: The druids' magic protects the grove, but she may be able to break through.
hde4dbdb1g47f5g49cdg9ad4g5afccb3c5bd3: I have orders to capture him.
hbc83cc66gb80ag4086gaefeg8ce16e2f7e79: He is not important. But if you were sent here to hunt him perhaps you can help me.
h7955fadfg7f5ag4136gb266g912edad49ce5: The druid makes his home in a nearby sanctuary where his followers worship a false god.
h015c01f6g05f6g4456ga115g7952dbf39f0b: Orders from who? This is my command, and if you were sent here I would have been told to expect you.
h05931cd0g9792g4d2aga617g8b845fe8433b: I'm told that drow have escorted a prisoner from this camp. Where did they take her?
h46f8af18g5600g45f9g8969gfd4ed0da3ec4: Perhaps one day, you will be worthy of such attention. For now, your only concern is the hunt.
h46c43650g7da9g4a70g9ab8gc9c8400678aa: Worshippers of a false god. Their existence is an insult to the Absolute's claim on this region.
h183e501egd287g4e11g8523g43353ae74982: The thief whimpering in our dungeon tried to flee to their sanctuary.
h9052704fg4b8dg46b7g82cdg2b4507669975: We will continue to remove parts of him until he tells us exactly where it is.
h5de03288g66bdg4c7egb662gcf83c6350233: I have my own business to take care of.
h629442b5g38cdg47c7gb917g44bc6082c26d: This tribe is mine to command. If you have business here, then you report to me.
h3a1891c0g6159g47afgb0bdg24fea6d616da: How do you know I'm a True Soul?
h170b3ae2gaaacg4f40gba9cg32d737cb9088: Why do you ask? Surely you feel the Absolute moving through me - just as I feel Her in you.
h35d65602ga78dg4bd0g8301gc1e1b1503beb: Now - let us hunt together, sister. In Her name.
h6f593ee2gd751g4f62gb219g5d152c8c7f57: Now - you must obey me and hunt, jaluk. In Her name.
hc2810ccegfae7g4773g8486g2baa074efe0f: Why She chose iblith such as you, I cannot say. But we must hunt together.
hc8b067b9ga3edg4a77g8b20gc679a0f24639: Why is a drow commanding a tribe of goblins?
hf5eeb263g2364g4640ga262gb05ef67e2a20: They are servants of the Absolute. In sufficient numbers, they are an effective force. Expendable and willing.
h7ba7beb0g64d7g4d49gaa9eg990a28d2daeb: But they do not have the wits to lead this hunt with me. Do you?
h1f2127c3g274eg4630g90fdg16580e87f18f: I'm on a hunt too - you're my prey.
hcf4517e4g2d2ag4832gbef1gb93e1f6b0da2: Join you? I'm here to kill you.
h49b279b3g9e0fg48d0gb636g53ad704b3448: Obey you? I'm here to kill you.
h4f0633c3g8f90g4710g8e01g5c4717dbc793: You would dare... ? The darkness will take you, iblith!
heedf40c5g693cg4cf7gb900gf1dc5a3d4099: Praise be. A True Soul. Are you here to join the hunt, sister?
ha7405430g1a5fg4bacga8cag4baebe25c87f: Praise be. A True Soul. Are you here to join the hunt, brother?
hb8f90abega41ag4298g86f5g3f66f45d0cb5: A True Soul? Praise be. Are you here to join my hunt?
hd7427074gee1dg4f11gba10gdd67a98c1014: Your scouting party has not returned, and half of the intruders escaped your guards.
h4163fe2eg6486g42f6g889ag71f135be2172: Until their sanctuary is found, I will take something precious from you every hour that passes.
h41b36398gdf71g4756g9052g82c8e6a2c0e4: I ain't no use without my limbs! The lads'll make the prisoner squeal soon enough, I swear!
h81c8d934g6d69g4de8ga6b7g83f251f95201: Silence now, creature. Or I will silence you forever.
h95b5522dgdeb6g4596g9a41g46cbde24e968: I do not have time for interruptions, sister.
